people.title: 取締役技術統括管理部長

research_notes: Research date: 2026-06-26. Website https://solumina.co.jp/ accessible. Founded 1983 as 株式会社セントラルシステムズ, renamed to SOLUMINA in 2023. Capital: 42M JPY. 149 employees. President: 田中洋史. Medical cloud solutions (QLIFICA series) + system integration. ISO27001, Privacy Mark. HQ in Minatomirai, Yokohama. KIA member.
